title: Cemex —— 按需混凝土配送 BMC
contentDateLabel: 2005 年(Zambrano 时代峰值,2008 危机前)

label.zh: 按需混凝土配送(1990 年代后)

description.en: Single BMC capturing Cemex post-Zambrano-era operational transformation. Cement / ready-mix concrete is the physical product, but the value capture is in the on-time delivery service overlay — GPS-tracked trucks, dispatch optimisation, 20-minute on-site commitment, and Construrama retailer-network coordination. The customer 'job' shifted from 'buy concrete' to 'have concrete on-site exactly when needed'.
description.zh: 单张 BMC 捕获 Zambrano 时代之后 Cemex 的运营转型。水泥 / 预拌混凝土是实物产品,但价值捕获在准时送达的服务叠加层上 —— GPS 车队、调度优化、20 分钟到场承诺,以及 Construrama 零售商网络协同。客户的「任务」从「买混凝土」变成了「让混凝土准时到工地」。
